game.title: Climbin' Cliff
game.short_text: Climb high with quirky controls to retrieve your lost Golden dumbbells!

details.title: Climbin' Cliff
details.description:
CONTROLS: WASD or Arrow keys to move/jump, space bar to do a big jump when climbing. When in a level use the top buttons to Restart (or press R), Pause (or press P), or Skip Level. Play in fullscreen!
Clifton Goldbell was an ordinary citizen of the suburbs, when one day a critical mistake costs him all of his gym equipment! Help our buddy Cliff regain his protein shakes and golden dumbbells as fast as you can across various environments. Can you POWER up Cliff enough to beat every level?
Each stage has a target time, see if you can beat them! You can turn off the timer in the level select or pause menu. If you want some tips on advanced moves to save some time, try looking around closely at the outer walls in Level 2... This game was created in 8 days for Big Mode Game Jam 2025.
*accidently made the time trial for level 12 0:12s instead of 0:45s, my bad

game.title: powery
game.short_text: parry to gain POWER. bigmode game jam

details.title: powery
details.description:
PARRY TO GAIN POWER. ATTACKING SCALES WITH POWER BUT ATTACKING WILL USE YOUR POWER. SAVE YOUR POWER TO GET A SCREENWIPE
DIFFICULT BUT BEATABLE! YOU GOT THIS!
INTERACT: E / Controller(A): PRESS  NEAR LEVEL RELICS TO LEVEL 
PAUSE/CLOSE: P or C
MOVE: WASD
PARRY: Space / R-Mouse / Left Bumper 
ATTACK: J / L-Mouse/ Right Bumper 
ROLL:  L-Shift / Controller(B) 
ULTIMATE POWER: Q/ENTER/Controller(X) 
Developed this Solo with the help of Crimbledink for the sound and music and found some amazing assets on itch, the game would not be the same without them! 
Assets: 
Crimbledink Soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/nick-adams-121526848 
https://immortal-burrito.itch.io/blood-demons

https://itch.io/s/115016/pixel-structures

https://gizmo199.itch.io/hooded-drifter-8-directional-sprite

https://kenney.nl/ 
https://dani-maccari.itch.io/platformer-metroidvania-pixel-items-free-assets 
https://asgaard42.itch.io/pixel-art-directional-lightning-effect

Partial Controller Support: Ran out of time for UI controller support (coming in the first after jam version of powery!)

game.title: Ninjas In Paris
game.short_text: Build up devastating combos through parrying, slice through hoardes of ninjas.

details.title: Ninjas In Paris
details.description:
Yeezy's interview with Alex Jones is cut short... by katanas. Parry attacks, build up combos, and release ninja-ending slashes to save France. Consecutive parries power up Kanye's strike: increasing his attack area and killing stronger foes. Stay alert, however. Taking damage will reset your power.

Controls:WASD / Arrow Keys to moveX / Right Click to CounterZ / Left Click to AttackHold Shift when countering to bounce away from the enemies

game.title: POWERCHORD
game.short_text: POWERCHORD made for Bigmode Game Jam 2025

details.title: POWERCHORD
details.description:
Under the game jam's theme of "POWER", our first-time game making team has thrown together a (hopefully functional) game!
Using the theme of POWER, we tied our game around both musical power CHORDS and a universal POWER status bar!

CONTROLS
WASD: Movement
Left Click: Melee
Right Click: Ranged Shot
Aim the direction of your attacks with the cursor
Hold down left or right click to charge your attack, but watch out that you don't spend all your POWER!

CONCEPT
The game has a focus on using ONE pool for your HEALTH, your STAMINA, and your MONEY.  Gamble your life with powerful charge attacks to defeat enemies and survive through the chaos of a street riddled with ones of twos of enemy types!
Buy upgrades at the shop to increase your stats and improve your chances against an ever more powerful army of baddies!

moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Arcade, Pixel Art, Roguelike, Singleplayer, Sprites, Top-Down

Build lightning rods and farm lightning as a S.H.R.I.M.P. Drone while trying your best to stay alive.
[Leaderboard is global online, so keep the names clean]
Controls:
WASD to Move
E to Interact/Build
Don't get hooked by the drones, struck by lightning, or fall off the platform.
Get power and points when lightning strikes your lightning rods, and use the power at the generator to get more scrap for more lightning rods.just extract the folder and play the exe

details.title: Bots n' Batteries
details.description:
Bots ‘n’ Batteries - By Team Critical Hit

Description
Bots ‘n’ Batteries is a twin-stick shooter created within one week for the BIGMODE-jam 2025, where the main theme is power. The game consists of multiple waves of up to four enemy types and one hulking boss. In the game, your goal is keep your health from depleting by destroying robots and gathering their batteries meanwhile the more batteries you obtain the faster your special weapon will charge. To win, you have to destroy each spawned enemy including the boss. 
Story
The year is 22XX, There has been a sudden malfunction in the universal cyber security mainframe server, all security bots have gone rogue after recieving a new battery upgrade, now they view humanity as a virus. Their last line of defense lingers on Voltstella, a older model security droid unaffected by the virus, with help of her special voltaic beam infuser, she is able to convert power from batteries to pure energy to fight back!

Supported Inputs - Mouse/Keyboard and Controller
NOTE: If you don't hear sound in the menus, click inside the game window. 
Contributions
Chase Cobb : Programming and Technical LeadMagnaremora : Audio / Visual effects, Texture & Asset Refinement, Cover ArtArtificer-111 : Concept Art and Creative Contributions
Tools
Game Engine : Unity with FMODSound Software : FL Studio 11 and FMODArt Software : Spritemancer, PixelFX Designer and PhotoshopV1.1 FixesFixed bug that caused score to be partially reset after taking damageFixed feedback for the player taking damageFixed an issue where the battery bar could be overloaded and would null out some player damageFixed possible deviation of player bullets from 8 degrees to 2 degrees

moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Pixel Art, Twin Stick Shooter, Unity

game.title: lith_ion
game.short_text: Explode enemies, absorb their power, and navigate the EV1L corp warehouse while trying to survive waves of enemy robots.

details.title: lith_ion
details.description:
You play as a robot who has gone rogue and attempts to infiltrate the EV1L corporation. Use your main power blast to explode enemies, rocket jump, and power the environment while surviving waves of enemy robots.

_about():
This is our first game jam, a first person shooter made with all original art, animations, and models. Everything was made in one week during and for the Bigmode Game Jam 2025, using the Godot engine.
_controls():
LEFT CLICK to shoot power blast (and rocket jump)
RIGHT CLICK to siphon power from up to three enemies at a time!
WASD to walk around
SPACE to jump
SHIFT + ~ to enable the debug menu, which has god mode cheats!
_credits():

Graphics programming:Cameron Walker
3D modeling, animation, and art:Matthew Teeter
Music and audio:Gabriel Gonzales

details.title: Grid Lock
details.description:
If you've ever wondered what Black Jack but with dice and light bulbs was like you've come to the right place
HOW TO PLAY:
Menus are currently click navigated
SPACE KEY to roll dice/hitClick on an empty slot to place a dice you've rolled (only the first column on the left is currently available)ENTER KEY to end your turn/hold
Try and get as close to the Target Current as you can placing dice on an electrical panel.
Every 2 full turns (both the NPC and the Player have gone twice), a current is ran to the light in the center. 
If either side has a number greater than the Target Current, the  light will blow and anyone over the Target Current will lose points.Whoever is closest to the Target Current will get the light bulb and points equivalent to their current.If it is a tie, neither character gets the light bulb but they will still get points for the dice count.

First round, both the Player and the NPC can roll and place up to 3 dice for free. Every turn after the first round, both characters can only roll a single dice.  (Please note: there is only one instance of the dice on the tables right now. If you want to keep any of your first three dice, place it before you roll again!)
The winner of the previous round goes first in the next round.
You can choose to HOLD instead of placing a dice. If you hold, you can not roll any more dice until the current has gone through. If you roll, you MUST place the dice you rolled or you can not end your turn. The current will be ran early if both characters hold instead of rolling.
Light bulbs give point bonuses at the end of a round. The more you collect, the better your point total. Each light has a different rarity and range of currents it asks for.
Light TypeColorRarityPoints AwardedAverage YellowCommon20 SturdyGreenUncommon50 FragilePurpleRare100
As of publishing, both opponent characters only play for 10 rounds. Coil plays it much safer and will try to stay under the current, while Tesla is much more erratic and will absolutely refuse to let you have lights if she can't get it for herself.
Extra Features
Clicking on your panel's wires will change the wire type. Wires can add multipliers to your dice scores when you pull a light bulb or tie, but they can also break if they take enough damage from lights bursting. Every time a light bursts, the wire takes 1 point of damage. 
Wire TypeMultiplierHealthGoldx110 Redx1.55Greenx22
As of publishing, GOLD wires can not break. Wires are also randomized on click and there is no limit to how many of each you can have.
If a slot has no wire or the wire is broken, the dice value attached to that wire is not added to the current.

Not everything planned was able to be fully implemented but most of the meat is there. Made for Bigmode Game Jam 2025.
Credits
Slogbait - Programming, Game DesignSammy (pandaleafs: bsky, kofi) - Visual Art, Game DesignMake sure the folder you unzip the Windows release for also has the .pck file in it! It will not run without it

details.description:
2025 Bigmode Game Jam Finalist
 
We’re working on a full version of Fugue Shot. Wishlist on Steam Today!


You can also Join our Discord to get the latest updates on the game, give feedback, and playtest new features - we’d love your input!

NOTE: CLICK HERE to play in browser on gx.games.
——
What is real, and what is a dream?
——
Fugue Shot is a physics puzzle roguelike set in a surreal dream-state world initially created for the 2025 Bigmode Game Jam.



The jam version of the game has five levels and does not save - it's intended to be completed in one sitting.



Click "Menu" in-game for instructions on how to play.

Created by Rare Dialect

Art, Art Direction: Tomás Aroza Rodríguez (@tomisit0art)

details.title: Line Man
details.description:
Controls (Keyboard): 
Z (as in Zebra) = A (interact)
X = B (Press A while holding B to move backwards with batteries)
Arrow keys = D-pad (Move)
Enter = Start (Level reset)
Right Shift = Select (Level select while on the title screen)
Line Man is a short puzzle game where you play as an engineer trying to fix power lines so they can watch their television. Through the use of several different kinds of modules, they reroute, reconnect, and transport power in an intricate (spaghetti) layout of wires.
Line Man was made in GB Studio, meaning that the rom can be exported and played on real Nintendo hardware, provided you have a flash cart and a way to get it on there. I did have to do some cheese with color mode, so it runs much better on a game boy color than an original game boy.
Please send me any feedback, bug reports, or questions (this is my first puzzle game) on discord at preeminent_bunny
